text:
Once upon an enchanted afternoon in a verdant forest clearing, a tiny bunny named Beanstalk looked at his reflection in a glistening pond. He thought, "I wish I had something big and important to do."

Moments later, a booming voice echoed through the trees. "Did you ever dream of becoming the biggest bunny who ever crititched?"

Startled, Beanstalk spun around to see Big Bunny hopping towards him. "Oh, hello! Yes, I dream... of acquiring greatness!"

Big Bunny plopped down beside Beanstalk. "Oh, I've got the biggest antlers in all the meadows."

Beanstalk hopped excitedly. "Antlers? I have this twiggy nose!"

"You have a heart as big as mine," Big Bunny said. "Ever dream of exploration?"

Beanstalk nodded eagerly. "All the time!"

"You'll go on a journey. You'll travel through forests, over hills, and beneath the sea. Every animal you meet will help you
